calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Jul-11-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS MICHAEL MULLIGAN, GINA MULLIGAN AND MICHAEL J. MULLIGAN DEVELOPMENT, INC.'S Motion For Change Of Venue is granted and the case is transferred to Los Angeles County. Venue for the accounting, breach of fiduciary duty, and negligence causes of action is in Los Angeles, defendants' place of residence. See CCP 395. Moreover, the action, at least in part, concerns partnership obligations that arose prior to the written contract. The contract claim is also properly venued in Los Angeles since that is where Defendant entered into the contract and was to perform it, but, even if the breach of contract cause of action were properly venued in San Francisco, the joinder of the other claims compels granting this motion. "In a mixed action, a plaintiff alleges two or more causes of action each of which is governed by a different venue statute'In cases with mixed causes of action, a motion for change of venue must be granted on the entire complaint if the defendant is entitled to a change of venue on any one cause of action." Brown v. Sup. Crt. (1984) 37 Cal.3d 477, 488.
ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/PJB
